user.title: Select printer
user.description: Bambu Companion adds statistics, cost tracking and maintenance reminders to an existing Bambu Lab printer. Prerequisite: the ha-bambulab integration must already be set up and the printer connected.

data_description.device_id: Select the printer you want to monitor. Bambu Companion reads live data from ha-bambulab and adds its own counters, print costs and maintenance plans.

ams.title: AMS units
ams.description: The Automatic Material System (AMS) enables multi-filament printing. Select all AMS units connected to this printer. Printers without AMS skip this step automatically.

data_description.ams_device_ids: All detected AMS units are pre-selected. Remove any units you do not want to monitor.

energy.title: Energy & costs
energy.description: Bambu Companion calculates print costs from energy consumption and filament weight. The optional sensors enable accurate measurement instead of estimates — you can also add them later in Settings.

data_description.electricity_price: Price per kWh, e.g. 0.30 for 30 cents. Used for cost estimates when no live sensor is provided.
data_description.electricity_sensor: Optional: sensor with the current electricity price per kWh — e.g. from Tibber or another tariff service.
data_description.energy_sensor: Optional: kWh sensor of a smart plug connected to the printer. Provides actual consumption instead of an estimate.
data_description.filament_cost: Cost per kilogram of filament, e.g. 25.00. Bambu Companion calculates filament costs from the consumed weight.
data_description.currency: Currency symbol for sensors and dashboard cards, e.g. € or $.
data_description.filament_unit: Unit for filament quantity display — kg or g.

notify.title: Notifications
notify.description: Bambu Companion can notify you via your smartphone and/or the Home Assistant inbox. Both channels are independently configurable. Quiet hours suppress all smartphone notifications.

data_description.notify_targets: Select your smartphone or tablet from the list of HA Companion App devices. Leave empty to use only the HA inbox.
data_description.notify_interval: A progress update is sent every X percent, e.g. 25 = at 25 %, 50 %, 75 % and 100 %.
data_description.quiet_from: Start of quiet hours. During this period NO smartphone notifications are sent (applies to all event types). HA inbox messages are not affected.
data_description.quiet_to: End of quiet hours. Smartphone notifications resume afterwards.

import.title: Print time source
import.description: Bambu Companion can read the print time directly from the printer or count it itself. Recommendation: leave enabled — this shows the full lifetime of the printer immediately.

data_description.import_total_hours:
Enabled (recommended): the 'Total print time' sensor shows the hours counted internally by the printer firmware — i.e. the complete lifetime, including before this installation.
Disabled: Bambu Companion only counts print time from the moment of setup onwards.

abort.no_bambu_devices: No Bambu Lab printers found. Please set up the ha-bambulab integration first.

init.title: Settings – Bambu Companion
init.description: Select the section you want to configure.

energy.title: Costs & Energy
energy.description: Enter your electricity price and filament costs. Optional sensors allow Bambu Companion to read live energy values from a smart plug or a dynamic tariff feed.

data_description.electricity_price: Price per kWh, e.g. 0.30 for 30 cents.
data_description.electricity_sensor: Sensor whose state contains the current electricity price in €/kWh.
data_description.energy_sensor: kWh sensor of a smart plug connected to the printer – enables accurate energy tracking.
data_description.filament_cost: Cost per kilogram of filament, e.g. 25.00.
data_description.currency: Currency symbol shown in sensors and cards, e.g. € or $.

notify.title: Notifications
notify.description:
Phone channel and HA inbox are independently configurable. Quiet hours suppress all smartphone notifications.

{camera_hint}

data_description.printer_display_name: Name of the printer shown in notifications and cards.
data_description.notify_targets: Select your smartphone or tablet from the list of HA Companion App devices. Leave empty to use only the HA inbox.
data_description.notify_interval: A progress update is sent every X percent, e.g. 25 = at 25 %, 50 %, 75 % and 100 %.
data_description.quiet_from: Start of quiet hours – NO smartphone notifications after this time (applies to all event types). The HA inbox is not affected.
data_description.quiet_to: End of quiet hours – smartphone notifications resume.
data_description.notify_mobile_start: Push notification to phone when a print starts.
data_description.notify_mobile_progress: Push notification to phone every X percent progress (configure interval above).
data_description.notify_mobile_done: Push notification to phone when a print finishes successfully.
data_description.notify_mobile_error: Push notification to phone when a print error or cancellation occurs.
data_description.notify_mobile_maintenance: Push notification to phone when a maintenance task becomes due.
data_description.notify_mobile_nozzle_change: Push notification to phone when a nozzle type or size change is detected.
data_description.notify_ha_done: HA inbox notification (bell) when a print finishes successfully.
data_description.notify_ha_error: HA inbox notification (bell) when a print error or cancellation occurs.
data_description.notify_ha_maintenance: HA inbox notification (bell) when a maintenance task becomes due.
data_description.notify_ha_nozzle_change: HA inbox notification (bell) when a nozzle type or size change is detected.
data_description.action_btn_1_title: Text for the first notification button.
data_description.action_btn_1_uri: URI/URL opened when Action 1 is tapped. Choose a preset or enter a custom path.
data_description.action_btn_2_camera_title: Text for the second button when a camera is detected for this printer. The URI is built automatically (entityId:camera.xxx).
data_description.action_btn_2_fallback_title: Text for the second button when NO camera is detected. Leave empty to disable button 2.
data_description.action_btn_2_uri: URI opened when NO camera is detected. Choose a preset or enter a custom path.
data_description.action_btn_3_mode: Function of the third button. 'Mute Progress' = a push notification action button lets the user enter minutes to mute progress notifications (auto-cleared when print ends).

maintenance.title: Maintenance intervals
maintenance.description: Enable or disable individual tasks and configure their intervals. A notification is sent when the interval is reached.

data.left_nozzle_replace: Toolhead left nozzle replaced – reset hours counter (H2D)
data.right_nozzle_replace: Toolhead right nozzle replaced – reset hours counter (H2D)
data.carbon_rods: Clean carbon rods – IPA only, no oil! (X1/X1C/X1E/P1S)

data_description.nozzle_clean: Trigger: nozzle print hours. Resets reminder only, not the hours counter.
data_description.nozzle_replace: Trigger: nozzle print hours. Resets the full nozzle hours counter to 0 when acknowledged.
data_description.left_nozzle_clean: Trigger: nozzle print hours. Resets reminder only.
data_description.left_nozzle_replace: Trigger: nozzle print hours. Resets left nozzle hours counter to 0 when acknowledged.
data_description.right_nozzle_clean: Trigger: nozzle print hours. Resets reminder only.
data_description.right_nozzle_replace: Trigger: nozzle print hours. Resets right nozzle hours counter to 0 when acknowledged.
data_description.filament_cutter: Trigger: print count | Wiki → Bambu: Filament Cutter
data_description.heatbreak: Trigger: print hours | Wiki → Bambu: Hotend Cleaning
data_description.lube_linear: Trigger: print hours | Wiki → Bambu: Linear Rods & Bearings
data_description.lube_z: Trigger: print hours | Wiki → Bambu: Lead Screws
data_description.carbon_rods: Trigger: print hours | Wiki → Bambu: Carbon Rods
data_description.belt: Trigger: print hours | Wiki → Bambu: Belt Tension
data_description.extruder_gear: Trigger: print hours | Wiki → Bambu: Extruder
data_description.fans_clean: Trigger: print hours | Wiki → Bambu: Part Cooling Fans
data_description.hepa_filter: Trigger: print hours (all materials) | Wiki → Bambu: Carbon Filter
data_description.carbon_filter: Trigger: fume print hours (ABS, ASA, PA, PC, TPU, ...) + laser hours (H2D) | Wiki → Bambu: Carbon Filter
data_description.ams_gears: Trigger: print hours | Wiki → Bambu: AMS Maintenance

texts.title: Customise notification texts
texts.description: Customise titles, message bodies and button labels for each notification. Available placeholders: '{drucker}', '{name}', '{progress}', '{remaining}', '{duration}', '{weight}', '{energy}', '{cost}', '{wartung}', '{stunden}', '{intervall}'.

data_description.max_history: Wie viele abgeschlossene Druckjobs im Verlauf gespeichert werden. 0 = unbegrenzt.
data_description.import_total_hours:
Eingeschaltet (empfohlen): Der Sensor "Druckzeit gesamt" zeigt die vom Drucker intern gezählten Gesamtstunden – also die komplette Lebenszeit, auch vor dieser Installation.
Ausgeschaltet: Bambu Companion zählt die Druckzeit nur ab dem Zeitpunkt der Einrichtung selbst mit.

poweroff.title: Auto-Poweroff
poweroff.description: Schaltet die Steckdose des Druckers automatisch aus, wenn nach einem abgeschlossenen Druck für eine konfigurierbare Zeit kein neuer Auftrag gestartet wird.

data_description.auto_poweroff_enabled: Wenn aktiviert, wird die Steckdose nach Ablauf der Wartezeit ausgeschaltet, sofern kein neuer Druck gestartet wurde.
data_description.auto_poweroff_switch: Switch- oder Input-Boolean-Entity der smarten Steckdose, an der der Drucker angeschlossen ist.
data_description.auto_poweroff_delay_min: Wie viele Minuten nach Druckende auf einen neuen Auftrag gewartet wird, bevor der Drucker ausgeschaltet wird. Standard: 60 Minuten.
data_description.auto_poweroff_dry_mode: 'Fragen': Push-Benachrichtigung mit Auswahl senden. 'Immer ausschalten': Steckdose ohne Rückfrage abschalten. 'Trocknung abwarten': Drucker bleibt an, wenn die AMS noch trocknet.
